html:
Exclusive to:

“Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.”

-

Ancient Tilework is a naturally generated and craftable turf exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in A Little Drama and QOL update. It can be found in Ruins or crafted in the Decorations Filter. It constantly glows on the surface and changes its appearance depending on the Nightmare Cycle in the Caves.

Imitation Ancient Tilework

“Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.”

-

Imitation Ancient Tilework is a craftable turf added in Don't Starve Together. It can be crafted in the Decorations Filter from two Rocks. Unlike Ancient Brickwork, it does not change its appearance.

TurfsCraftable Items

title: Ancient Tilework

'''Ancient Tilework''' is a naturally generated and craftable [[Turfs|turf]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' introduced in ''[[A Little Drama and QOL]]'' update. It can be found in [[Ruins]] or crafted in the [[Decorations Filter]]. It constantly glows on the surface and changes its appearance depending on the [[Nightmare Cycle]] in the [[Caves]].

{{Clear}}
